# Mohiuddin Ansari — Senior Android Developer

> Portfolio: https://ansarii.github.io/dev.ae/

## Who is Mohiuddin Ansari?

Mohiuddin Ansari is a **Senior Android Developer** based in **Dubai, UAE** with **8+ years** of professional experience building native Android applications using **Kotlin and Java**.

He is currently **available for hire** — freelance Android development contracts, remote work, and full-time senior Android roles worldwide.

## Core Skills

- **Android Development**: Kotlin, Java, Android SDK, Jetpack Compose
- **Architecture**: MVVM, Clean Architecture, Repository Pattern
- **Cross-platform**: Flutter, Dart
- **Backend/Cloud**: Firebase, Supabase, Room DB, REST APIs
- **AI Integration**: OpenAI API, Gemini API, Roboflow
- **Payments**: HyperPay, Razorpay, UAE Pass integration

## Career Highlights

- **Tech Lead / Senior Software Engineer** — Emirates Auction LLC (2020–2024)
  - Led mobile architecture for Dubai Police systems and Emirates Auction (1M+ users)
  - Architected high-stability systems for government-grade platforms
  - 98% reliability, 24/7 uptime for mission-critical auction infrastructure

- **Senior Software Engineer** — Freelance (2020, Apr–Nov)
  - 3+ high-impact projects: UI/UX, fintech payment gateways, e-commerce

- **Senior Software Engineer** — HJ Software Pvt. Ltd. (2018–2020)
  - Improved app performance by 45%, reduced production bugs by 70%
  - Enterprise Android architecture: MVVM, Clean Architecture

- **Android Developer** — Cloudadic Inc. (2016–2017)
  - Facial recognition authentication, core mobile security features

## Notable Projects (Android)

1. **Emirates Auction Android App** — Largest auction platform in Middle East, 1M+ users, Kotlin/Java
2. **Dubai Police Mobile Infrastructure** — Government-grade, 24/7 mission-critical, Android
3. **UBS Travel Booking** — KSA travel platform, HyperPay integration, 50K+ bookings
4. **Kaaf & Waselly** — Saudi food/grocery delivery, Flutter, real-time tracking, 500+ vendors
5. **Scam Check AI** — AI-powered scam detection app, Gemini API + Android
6. **AI Buddy** — AI assistant app for Android & iOS
